allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "$env:USERPROFILE\\.vscode\\extensions\\stmicroelectronics.stm32cube-ide-core-1.3.0-win32-x64" | Select-Object Name; ls "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\STMicroelectronics" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name)

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\stm32cube\\bundles\\gnu-tools-for-stm32" -Recurse -Filter "arm-none-eabi-gcc.exe" | Select-Object FullName; Get-ChildItem "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\stm32cube\\bundles\\cmake" -Recurse -Filter "cmake.exe" | Select-Object FullName; Get-ChildItem "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\stm32cube\\bundles\\ninja" -Recurse -Filter "ninja.exe" | Select-Object FullName)
